inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $4939.7M less capital spending $168.7M ÷ 408.7M diluted shares per ADP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250806_rpt20250630_acc0000008670_25_000037.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF per share anchors owner cash; client-fund pass-through excluded; interest on client funds is separate segment economics.

bear.notes: Payroll share loss to Paychex/Workday; client-fund yield compression

base.notes: Employer Services retention + PEO mix shift; mid-single-digit revenue growth

bull.notes: International HCM and PEO acceleration; stable client-fund spreads

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light payroll processor; client funds are pass-through (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Recurring payroll/HCM contracts; RPO recognized over time

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: PEO services revenue $1.53B FY2025; separate peo_workforce_platform_option component

growth_explanation.mechanism: Employer Services retention and price increases on payroll/HCM subscriptions; PEO mix shift and international expansion; partially offset by client-fund yield sensitivity
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Employer Services revenue growth falls below 3% for four consecutive quarters
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: PEO services revenue growth re-accelerates above 10% with stable margins

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map payroll/HCM owner cash, PEO platform option, net financial claims, and competition/client-funds reserve once each.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250806_rpt20250630_acc0000008670_25_000037.htm: FY2025 service revenue $20560.9M, OCF $4939.7M, FCF $4771.0M, cash $3347.8M, total debt $8744.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 weighted average diluted shares outstanding

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; excludes client-fund flows (pass-through balance sheet).

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade as payroll/HCM market matures.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Mature compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 22× / 25× / 28× on year-7 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250806_rpt20250630_acc0000008670_25_000037.htm: FY2025 service revenue $20560.9M, OCF $4939.7M, FCF $4771.0M, cash $3347.8M, total debt $8744.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 PEO services revenue (excluding pass-through)
FY2025 PEO direct pass-through costs (excluded from owner cash)
FY2025 diluted shares

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted PEO and workforce-platform expansion upside
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on PEO co-employment and international HCM expansion beyond normalized payroll engine; H1 FY2026 revenue +7% supports base band.

calculations.label: PEO and workforce platform option per share

components.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250806_rpt20250630_acc0000008670_25_000037.htm: FY2025 service revenue $20560.9M, OCF $4939.7M, FCF $4771.0M, cash $3347.8M, total debt $8744.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: Cash and cash equivalents (corporate, excluding client funds)
Commercial paper outstanding
Long-term debt noncurrent
FY2025 diluted shares

assumptions.label: Corporate cash required for payroll operations and liquidity
assumptions.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity; client funds excluded from corporate cash.

assumptions.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
assumptions.rationale: Filing-locked cash less commercial paper and long-term debt; low stresses refinancing and trapped liquidity.

components.label: Competition and client-fund rate stress reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250806_rpt20250630_acc0000008670_25_000037.htm: FY2025 service revenue $20560.9M, OCF $4939.7M, FCF $4771.0M, cash $3347.8M, total debt $8744.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 interest on funds held for clients

source.locator: Interest on funds held for clients $489.3M FY2025 (segment note)

inputs.label: FY2025 interest expense on corporate debt
FY2025 diluted shares

assumptions.label: Competition, client-fund rate, and regulatory stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for Paychex/workday competition, lower client-fund yields, and payroll regulatory risk not fully embedded in core owner-cash capitalization.

calculations.label: Competition and client-funds reserve per share

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADP, including payroll/HCM owner cash, PEO platform upside, net financial claims, and competition/client-funds reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated payroll engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; PEO option, net liquidity, and competition reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity before client funds ~$6.2B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($11.6736/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Payroll and HCM owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Employer Services normalized free cash flow
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: Client-fund pass-through excluded; interest on client funds in segment revenue.

component_groups.label: PEO and workforce-platform expansion option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental PEO co-employment and international HCM monetization
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on PEO growth upside.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; H1 FY2026 revenue +7% supports base band.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~40% that PEO/workforce platform sustains high-single-digit growth; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Co-employment contracts convert over 2–4 years per FY2025 10-K disclosures.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: PEO pass-through is client-funded; incremental capex minimal.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after commercial paper, long-term debt, and operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked cash less debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Client funds excluded; net debt ~$5.4B at FY2025.

component_groups.label: Competition and client-fund rate stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Paychex/Workday competition and client-fund yield compression stress
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: rate cuts could compress interest on client funds faster than low growth scenario.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Employer Services normalized free cash flow

valuation_proof.adjustment: Client-fund pass-through excluded; interest on client funds in segment revenue.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: PEO pass-through is client-funded; incremental capex minimal.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Payroll and HCM owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?

Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

Net cash and debt claims on common equity

Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
